section.title: DESCRIPTION
section.p: Create a ReplicaGroup. When creating a ReplicaGroup, the system will automatically generate a "groupID" for a ReplicaGroup.

plentry.pd:
ReplicaGroup name. All ReplicaGroup names are unique to each other in a database object.
Format The method "createRG()" contains the parameter "rgname", which is in the type od string. It should not be null. (<"ReplicaGroup name">)

ul.li: ReplicaGroup is not null string. It should not contains "." or "$". The length of it should not be greater than 127B.
